en: And he called the twelve together and gave them power and authority over all demons and to cure diseases,
zh: 耶穌召齊十二門徒，給他們能力、權柄，制伏一切鬼魔，醫治各樣的疾病，

en: and he sent them out to proclaim the kingdom of God and to heal.
zh: 差遣他們去宣講 神的國和醫治病人，

en: And he said to them, "Take nothing for your journey, no staff, nor bag, nor bread, nor money; and do not have two tunics.
zh: 對他們說：“不要帶著甚麼上路，不要帶手杖，不要帶口袋，不要帶食物，不要帶銀錢，也不要帶兩件衣服。

en: And whatever house you enter, stay there, and from there depart.
zh: 無論進哪一家，就住在那裡，直到離開。

en: And wherever they do not receive you, when you leave that town shake off the dust from your feet as a testimony against them."
zh: 凡不接待你們的，你們離開那城的時候，當把腳上的灰塵跺下去，作為反對他們的表示。”

en: And they departed and went through the villages, preaching the gospel and healing everywhere.
zh: 於是他們就出去，走遍各鄉，傳講福音，到處醫治病人。

en: Now Herod the tetrarch heard about all that was happening, and he was perplexed, because it was said by some that John had been raised from the dead,
zh: 分封王希律聽見所發生的一切事，猶豫不定，因為有人說：“約翰從死人中復活了。”

en: by some that Elijah had appeared, and by others that one of the prophets of old had risen.
zh: 又有人說：“以利亞顯現了。”還有人說：“古時的一位先知復活了。”

en: Herod said, "John I beheaded, but who is this about whom I hear such things?" And he sought to see him.
zh: 希律說：“約翰已經斬頭了，但這是誰，我怎麼會聽到他這些事呢？”就設法要見他。

en: On their return the apostles told him all that they had done. And he took them and withdrew apart to a town called Bethsaida.
zh: 使徒們回來，把所作的事報告耶穌。他帶著他們，悄悄地退往伯賽大城去。

en: When the crowds learned it, they followed him, and he welcomed them and spoke to them of the kingdom of God and cured those who had need of healing.
zh: 群眾知道了，也跟了去。他接待他們，向他們講論 神的國，醫好需要醫治的人。

en: Now the day began to wear away, and the twelve came and said to him, "Send the crowd away to go into the surrounding villages and countryside to find lodging and get provisions, for we are here in a desolate place."
zh: 天將晚的時候，十二門徒來到他跟前，說：“請解散眾人，好讓他們往周圍的田舍村莊，去找地方住，找東西吃，因為我們這裡是曠野。”

en: But he said to them, "You give them something to eat." They said, "We have no more than five loaves and two fish- unless we are to go and buy food for all these people."
zh: 他說：“你們給他們吃吧！”他們說：“我們所有的，不過是五個餅兩條魚，除非去為這些人另買食物。”

en: For there were about five thousand men. And he said to his disciples, "Have them sit down in groups of about fifty each."
zh: 原來男人就約有五千。他對門徒說：“叫他們一組一組地坐下，每組約五十人。”

en: And they did so, and had them all sit down.
zh: 門徒就照他的話，叫眾人坐下。

en: And taking the five loaves and the two fish, he looked up to heaven and said a blessing over them. Then he broke the loaves and gave them to the disciples to set before the crowd.
zh: 耶穌拿起這五個餅，兩條魚，望著天，祝謝了，擘開遞給門徒，擺在眾人面前。

en: And they all ate and were satisfied. And what was left over was picked up, twelve baskets of broken pieces.
zh: 他們都吃飽了，把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

en: Now it happened that as he was praying alone, the disciples were with him. And he asked them, "Who do the crowds say that I am?"
zh: 有一次耶穌獨自祈禱的時候，只有門徒和他在一起。他問他們：“人說我是誰？”

en: And they answered, "John the Baptist. But others say, Elijah, and others, that one of the prophets of old has risen."
zh: 他們回答：“有人說是施洗的約翰，有人說是以利亞，還有人說是古時的一位先知復活了。”

en: Then he said to them, "But who do you say that I am?" And Peter answered, "The Christ of God."
zh: 他又問他們：“你們說我是誰？”彼得回答：“是 神的基督！”

en: And he strictly charged and commanded them to tell this to no one,
zh: 耶穌警告他們，囑咐他們，不要把這事告訴人。

en: saying, "The Son of Man must suffer many things and be rejected by the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and on the third day be raised."
zh: 又說：“人子必須受許多苦，被長老、祭司長，和經學家棄絕、殺害，第三日復活。”

en: And he said to all, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross daily and follow me.
zh: 耶穌又對眾人說：“如果有人願意跟從我，就當捨己，天天背起他的十字架來跟從我。

en: For whoever would save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake will save it.
zh: 凡是想救自己生命的，必喪掉生命；但為我犧牲自己生命的，必救了生命。

en: For what does it profit a man if he gains the whole world and loses or forfeits himself?
zh: 人若賺得全世界，卻喪失自己，或賠上自己，有甚麼好處呢？

en: For whoever is ashamed of me and of my words, of him will the Son of Man be ashamed when he comes in his glory and the glory of the Father and of the holy angels.
zh: 凡是把我和我的道當作可恥的，人子在自己與父並聖天使的榮耀裡降臨的時候，也必把他當作可恥的。

en: But I tell you truly, there are some standing here who will not taste death until they see the kingdom of God."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，站在這裡的，有人在沒有嘗過死味以前必定要看見 神的國。”

en: Now about eight days after these sayings he took with him Peter and John and James and went up on the mountain to pray.
zh: 說了這些話以後約有八天，耶穌帶著彼得、約翰和雅各，上山去禱告。

en: And as he was praying, the appearance of his face was altered, and his clothing became dazzling white.
zh: 正禱告的時候，他的面貌就改變了，衣服潔白發光。

en: And behold, two men were talking with him, Moses and Elijah,
zh: 忽然有兩個人和他談話，就是摩西和以利亞。

en: who appeared in glory and spoke of his departure, which he was about to accomplish at Jerusalem.
zh: 他們在榮光裡顯現，談論他去世的事，就是他在耶路撒冷將要完成的。

en: Now Peter and those who were with him were heavy with sleep, but when they became fully awake they saw his glory and the two men who stood with him.
zh: 彼得和同伴都在打盹。醒過來之後，就看見他的榮光，並與他站在一起的那兩個人。

en: And as the men were parting from him, Peter said to Jesus, "Master, it is good that we are here. Let us make three tents, one for you and one for Moses and one for Elijah"- not knowing what he said.
zh: 二人正要離開他的時候，彼得對耶穌說：“主啊，我們在這裡真好！我們可以搭三個帳棚，一個為你，一個為摩西，一個為以利亞。”他根本不知道自己在說甚麼。

en: As he was saying these things, a cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were afraid as they entered the cloud.
zh: 他說這話的時候，有一片雲彩籠罩他們，他們入了雲彩，門徒就害怕起來。

en: And a voice came out of the cloud, saying, "This is my Son, my Chosen One; listen to him!"
zh: 有聲音從雲彩裡出來，說：“這是我的兒子，我所揀選的 ，你們要聽從他！”

en: And when the voice had spoken, Jesus was found alone. And they kept silent and told no one in those days anything of what they had seen.
zh: 聲音過了，只見耶穌獨自在那裡。在那些日子，門徒保持緘默，不把所看見的告訴任何人。

en: On the next day, when they had come down from the mountain, a great crowd met him.
zh: 第二天，他們下了山，有一大群人迎面而來。

en: And behold, a man from the crowd cried out, "Teacher, I beg you to look at my son, for he is my only child.
zh: 在人群中有一個人喊叫說：“老師，求你憐憫我的兒子，因為他是我的獨生子。

en: And behold, a spirit seizes him, and he suddenly cries out. It convulses him so that he foams at the mouth; and shatters him, and will hardly leave him.
zh: 你看，污靈一抓住他，他就忽然喊叫，並且抽瘋，口吐白沫；污靈又折磨糟踐他，不肯放過他。

en: And I begged your disciples to cast it out, but they could not."
zh: 我求過你的門徒，把他趕出去，他們卻辦不到。”

en: Jesus answered, "O faithless and twisted generation, how long am I to be with you and bear with you? Bring your son here."
zh: 耶穌說：“唉！這不信又乖謬的世代啊！我跟你們在一起，忍受你們，要到幾時呢？把你兒子帶到這裡來吧！”

en: While he was coming, the demon threw him to the ground and convulsed him. But Jesus rebuked the unclean spirit and healed the boy, and gave him back to his father.
zh: 那孩子正走過來的時候，污鬼把他摔倒，使他重重地抽瘋。耶穌斥責那污靈，把孩子醫好，交給他父親。

en: And all were astonished at the majesty of God. But while they were all marveling at everything he was doing, Jesus said to his disciples,
zh: 眾人都驚奇 神的大能。 眾人還在希奇耶穌所作的這一切時，他對門徒說：

en: "Let these words sink into your ears: The Son of Man is about to be delivered into the hands of men."
zh: “你們要把這些話存在心裡：人子將要被交在人的手裡。”

en: But they did not understand this saying, and it was concealed from them, so that they might not perceive it. And they were afraid to ask him about this saying.
zh: 門徒不明白這話，因為這話的意思是隱藏的，不讓他們明白，他們也不敢問。

en: An argument arose among them as to which of them was the greatest.
zh: 後來，門徒起了意見，爭論誰是最大的。

en: But Jesus, knowing the reasoning of their hearts, took a child and put him by his side
zh: 耶穌看出他們的心意，就領了一個小孩子來，叫他站在自己旁邊，

en: and said to them, "Whoever receives this child in my name receives me, and whoever receives me receives him who sent me. For he who is least among you all is the one who is great."
zh: 對他們說：“凡因我的名接待這小孩子的，就是接待我；凡接待我的，就是接待那差我來的。誰是你們中間最小的，那人就是最大的。”

en: John answered, "Master, we saw someone casting out demons in your name, and we tried to stop him, because he does not follow with us."
zh: 約翰說：“主，我們看見有一個人奉你的名趕鬼，就禁止他，因為他不和我們一起跟從你。”

en: But Jesus said to him, "Do not stop him, for the one who is not against you is for you."
zh: 耶穌說：“不要禁止他，因為不反對你們的，就是贊成你們的。”

en: When the days drew near for him to be taken up, he set his face to go to Jerusalem.
zh: 耶穌被接上升的日子快到了，他就決意向耶路撒冷去，

en: And he sent messengers ahead of him, who went and entered a village of the Samaritans, to make preparations for him.
zh: 並且差遣使者走在前頭；他們去了，進入撒瑪利亞的一個村莊，要為他預備。

en: But the people did not receive him, because his face was set toward Jerusalem.
zh: 那裡的人不接待他，因為他面向著耶路撒冷走。

en: And when his disciples James and John saw it, they said, "Lord, do you want us to tell fire to come down from heaven and consume them?"
zh: 他的門徒雅各、約翰看見了，就說：“主啊，你要我們吩咐火從天降下來，燒滅他們嗎？”

en: But he turned and rebuked them.
zh: 耶穌就轉過身來，責備他們，

en: And they went on to another village.
zh: 然後他們就往別的村莊去了。

en: As they were going along the road, someone said to him, "I will follow you wherever you go."
zh: 他們走路的時候，有一個人對他說：“你無論往哪裡去，我都要跟從你！”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head."
zh: 耶穌說：“狐狸有洞，天空的飛鳥有窩，人子卻沒有棲身的地方。”

en: To another he said, "Follow me." But he said, "Lord, let me first go and bury my father."
zh: 他對另一個人說：“你跟從我吧！”那人說：“主啊，請准我先回去安葬我的父親吧。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Leave the dead to bury their own dead. But as for you, go and proclaim the kingdom of God."
zh: 耶穌說：“讓死人去埋葬他們的死人，你應該去傳揚 神的國。”

en: Yet another said, "I will follow you, Lord, but let me first say farewell to those at my home."
zh: 又有一個人說：“主，我要跟從你，但容我先回去，向家人道別。”

en: Jesus said to him, "No one who puts his hand to the plow and looks back is fit for the kingdom of God."
zh: 耶穌說：“手扶著犁向後看的，不適合進 神的國。”
